title: halimium formosum
intro: Halimium formosum, also known as Golden-Rockrose or Formosum Rockrose, is a flowering plant species in the Cistaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Halimium formosum can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is sometimes used in combination with other herbs in traditional remedies.
